name: OpenIPAHound 90 Utility - Group Direct Members
description: Shows direct IPA_User and IPA_Group members for every FreeIPA group. This is the OpenGraph replacement for opening an AD group's Members panel; to browse one clicked group, copy the Cypher and add a group.cn filter from the Entity Panel.
query:
MATCH p=(member)-[member_edge:IPA_MemberOf]->(group:IPA_Group)
WHERE member:IPA_User OR member:IPA_Group
RETURN p, group.cn AS group_cn, coalesce(member.uid, member.cn, member.principal, member.fqdn) AS member_name, member_edge.source AS source
LIMIT 1000
